title: Jar Opener (4 PCS) - Rubber Jar Gripper for Weak Hands - Bottle Opener for Arthritic Hands - Jar Opener Gripper Pad - Lid Opener Non Tear - Coaster - Trivet, Green
description:
If you know someone who has a hard time opening bottles, jars, or tight containers, then tell them not to worry as an easy solution for opening bottles, jars, and tight containers is here!
Anyone from adults and teens to children and the elderly can easily grip and open any pickle jar, medicine bottle, or glass container with the help of these durable non-slip grip rounds.
These flat pads make great coasters for cups, as well as being perfect for plates and other kitchen utensils you don't want slipping around. Get a firm grip on things without the hassle!
reviews_5s: I have used my rubber jar openers so many times which saved my hands. They are really great!Finally! Grips of rubber (not slippery vinyl) that actually grip a jar top! I've tried several other versions of these, and they all turned out to be slick vinyl that simply slides around on a jar lid, no matter how tightly you squeeze. These rubber grips work!Bought this after my old jar opener grip finially fell apart after several years of use. Works great, glad I purchased!
